nodes.name: Schedule: Daily 3:00 AM ET
nodes.notes: Fires daily at 3:00 AM Eastern Time (8:00 AM UTC)

nodes.name: Load Outlet List (110 Outlets)
nodes.notes: Reads agi-outlet-list.json → outputs one item per outlet (RSS URL, tier, topics)

nodes.name: Fetch RSS Feed
nodes.notes: Fetches RSS XML for each outlet. 15s timeout, 3 retries. continueOnFail=true to avoid stopping on single outlet error.

nodes.name: Parse RSS Articles
nodes.notes: Parses RSS/Atom XML → extracts headline, URL, date, author. Max 30 items per outlet, 48h cutoff for tier 1-2.

nodes.name: Deduplicate Stories (SHA256)
nodes.notes: SHA256(normalized_headline + date) = story_id. Groups by story_id, counts unique sources. Outputs stats item + story items.

nodes.name: Filter Story Items
nodes.notes: Removes the stats item, keeps only story items for downstream processing.

nodes.name: Twitter Search + Credibility Scoring
nodes.notes: Calls Twitter API v2 for each story (max 40/run). Matches amplifiers against 18 AGI voices. Computes weighted_credibility = weighted_reach × accuracy_score. Uses TWITTER_BEARER_TOKEN env var.

nodes.name: Write Dashboard JSON
nodes.notes: Writes /data/dashboard-stories/dashboard-stories-YYYY-MM-DD.json + latest pointer. Returns major stories list.

nodes.name: Send Telegram Alerts (Major Stories)
nodes.notes: Sends Telegram alert for stories with 10+ sources. Format: 📰 Story · 🔊 N sources · Top: Yann, Sam, Demis. Uses TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN + TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID env vars.

nodes.name: Log Error + Notify
nodes.notes: Logs error to /data/errors/errors-YYYY-MM-DD.json and sends Telegram alert.
